svg.title: Skinfluence patient data flow diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the step-by-step data flow from a patient visiting the Skinfluence website through quiz, Bask Health intake, physician review, Rx fulfillment, and Klaviyo lifecycle email triggers.
svg.text: Patient data flow — visit to active subscription

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should a first-time visitor see on the Skinfluence homepage?')
sendPrompt('What should the Skinfluence skin assessment quiz questions be?')
sendPrompt('How does Recharge handle subscription checkout for a clinical skincare brand?')
sendPrompt('How does Bask Health patient intake work for a skincare brand?')
sendPrompt('How does async dermatologist review work in a telehealth skincare brand?')
sendPrompt('How does Empower Pharmacy handle Rx fulfillment for DTC skincare?')
sendPrompt('What does the Skinfluence monthly subscription refill flow look like?')
